verdict: Retargeting spend is generating leads cheaply but failing to convert into profitable purchases this period.
diagnosis: Cost per purchase hit $249.65 this period — roughly 5x the food DTC benchmark of $51, while return on ad spend stayed near zero.

signals.headline: Cost per purchase reached $249.65
signals.detail: Latest period cost to acquire a buyer is roughly 5x the food DTC benchmark. Unit economics are underwater.

signals.headline: 555 pixel leads at $1.11 each
signals.detail: Lead capture is working cheaply on Instagram retargeting. The funnel breaks between lead and checkout.

signals.headline: Only 2 checkouts initiated, 10 carts
signals.detail: Add-to-cart and checkout volume is tiny versus 1,063 landing page views. Product page or offer is not converting.

signals.headline: 639 purchases, only $18 tracked revenue
signals.detail: Purchase value tracking looks broken or wildly under-reported. Cannot trust return on ad spend until pixel values are fixed.

signals.headline: 508 reviews, 0 new this period
signals.detail: Google Business Profile shows zero new reviews logged this period. Social proof momentum has stalled.

recommendations.title: Audit the Meta purchase pixel and value tracking
recommendations.detail: 639 purchases reporting only $18 in value points to broken event setup. Worth fixing before scaling spend — current return on ad spend numbers cannot be trusted.

recommendations.title: Test a prospecting campaign alongside retargeting
recommendations.detail: All spend currently flows to a single retargeting ad set. Consider testing cold audiences with grilling-season creative to refill the top of the funnel.

recommendations.title: Fix the lead-to-purchase gap with email and offer
recommendations.detail: 555 leads captured but only 2 checkouts initiated. Test a welcome flow with a first-box discount or free shipping offer to convert leads into buyers.
